evidence.observed: The agreement effective November 3, 2025 prohibits unauthorized scraping, copying, browser plugins, automation, access-control bypass, and account or cookie sharing.
LinkedIn states that third-party software or browser extensions must not scrape, change, or automate activity on the service.

local_policy.data_use: Only user-entered or user-selected job and application details are stored locally.

change_triggers: LinkedIn publishes a revised user agreement or automation policy.
LinkedIn grants express written permission for a broader integration.
The Workbench begins reading browser, session, hidden-page, or network state.
